hero.LeafText: Join hands for a green planet
hero.Title2: Plant trees today, enjoy the harvest tomorrow!
hero.Desc1: Join thousands of people participating in environmental challenges, earning green points, and creating real change.
hero.Desc2: Each sapling planted today is a significant step toward clean air and a sustainable future.
hero.Desc3: Keeping oceans free of plastic waste protects biodiversity and the long-term survival of our entire planet.

howItWorks.Subtitle: Start your green lifestyle in just 3 steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Join the Green Flag community for free and start building sustainable living habits.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Choose daily challenges like picking up plastic trash, planting trees, watching educational videos to earn EcoCoins.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Use your accumulated EcoCoins in the exchange market to get eco-friendly products.

trust.globalDesc: Every small contribution adds up, addressing global climate change issues.
trust.safetyDesc: Mission approval and EcoCoin transactions happen automatically and transparently via the system audit board.
trust.qualityDesc: Gifts in the exchange market are strictly checked for organic origin and eco-friendly certification.

features.missionP: Discover a list of practical daily actions. From picking up plastic, planting trees, saving water/electricity to watching educational videos. Complete challenges to receive EcoCoins and help build a cleaner planet!
features.marketH2: Exchange Market - Turn points into real action
features.marketP: Receive worthy rewards for your efforts. Use EcoCoins to redeem sustainable green products, biodegradable straws, compostable bags, or useful green vouchers from Green Flag's partners.
features.communityP: Share photos of your environmental activities on the community feed. Discuss, interact, like, and comment to cheer everyone's actions to light up the most positive messages together!
